Crop Name: groundnut

Profile
- Season type: short-season (TSUM total=1672 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: warm-adapted (TBASEM=10.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature + daylength (IDSL=1, DLO=1.00 h)
- Root/water trait: shallow-rooted, moderately drought-tolerant (RDMCR=60.00 cm, DEPNR=4.00)
- Assimilation trait: moderate assimilation potential (AMAX peak=50.00)
- Storage allocation: mid storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=1.10)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0300
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0060, DVS1=0.0030
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.1042, DVS1=0.0521

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
